name: Black Rhinoceros
conservationEfforts: Anti-poaching units with technology like drones and GPS tracking. Rhino horn trade bans enforced internationally. Translocation programs establish new populations.
description: The black rhino has a hooked upper lip adapted for browsing on shrubs. Poaching reduced their numbers from 65,000 in 1970 to just 2,400 by 1995, but intensive conservation has enabled a slow recovery.
